title: phaseolus scaber
intro: Phaseolus scaber, also known as the small or dwarf runner bean, is a plant species native to Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phaseolus scaber include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
